title: Cycle Trading Signal plugged into AI 🔥 lists 🔥
author: Patient-Knowledge915

replies.author: Jonny_JonJon
replies.body: This is for option calls right?

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: Not necessarily that's just how I been trading some signals

replies.author: Jonny_JonJon
replies.body: How do yoh get these signals? You use finding as the screener right?

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: Cycle Trading Signal Process, which is now plugged into AI

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: All calls are in 12/2025  list that was made on November 21 ! I will make the list for 1/2026 this weekend for January 2026.

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: Buddy, it takes me 12 hours to make one of these lists or more, and It needs to be done after the market close and during the weekend. Lists have always been available, but I think from now on, I will just make them for my own use because to make this sheets public, I have to do an extra process that has not been worth it, the extra time a have to put in.
